description: Create a diagnostic image set for a case presentation using Blue Sky Plan with the patient DICOM data located at C:\workspace\data\SamplePatient. Export the following four views as PNG images to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\CasePresentation\: a Panoramic View showing the full panoramic curve of the jaw (panoramic_view.png), an Axial View showing the teeth roots or alveolar ridge (axial_view.png), a 3D Rendering showing an oblique lateral view of the mandible (3d_rendering_view.png), and a Cross-sectional View at the lower right first molar (Tooth #30) region (cross_section_view.png).
